depression.description: I feel completely overwhelmed trying to unpack and organize my new space without any help. It just reinforces the belief that I'm alone and that no one cares about me.
I've noticed that I keep withdrawing from social situations, like avoiding my friend's birthday party. It's like I can't handle being around people when I'm feeling this way.

depression.topic: Anticipation of negative interactions with my mother
depression.description: Whenever I think about talking to my mother, I get anxious because I just know it will end up being frustrating. I feel like I can't express my feelings without making things worse.
I worry that if I show my emotions, people will think I'm unstable or overreacting. It's easier to just keep everything bottled up, but it feels so heavy.

Delusion.description: I often feel like I'm unlovable and that nobody really wants me around. This belief makes it hard for me to reach out to others when I need support.
I feel like everyone, especially my mother, is judging me for how I handle my emotions. It makes me hesitant to open up because I fear their reactions.
